use ignore::overrides::OverrideBuilder;

fn build_overrides(root: &str, pattern: &str) -> ignore::overrides::Override {
    let mut builder = OverrideBuilder::new(root);
    builder.add(pattern).unwrap();
    builder.build().unwrap()
}

fn make_override(root: &str, user_glob: &str) -> ignore::overrides::Override {
    let mut ob = OverrideBuilder::new(root);
    ob.add(user_glob).expect("bad pattern");
    ob.build().expect("failed to build overrides")
}
